titleStmt.title: Letter from Lady Clonbrock to John J. Thompson, 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Augusta Clonbrock

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This letter was written by Augusta Caroline Dillon Clonbrock, Lady Clonbrock (1840-1928) to John Thompson Esq. In the letter Lady Clonbrock thanks Thompson and the board of the hospital for allowing the Clonbrock Co-operative Society an increased bonus and recognizing the increasing difficulties faced by the society.Aside from being the wife of Luke Gerald Dillon, 4th Baron Clonbrock, Lady Clonbrock was also a prominent member of the Irish Women's Association, founded to provide aid and assistance to Irish soldiers and prisoners of war. The letter was addressed to John James Thompson (1872-1924), the registrar at the Royal Hospital for Incurables.

msIdentifier.collection: Clonbrock Estate Papers, Collection List No. 54, Ms. 35796/10/13

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Copy of answer
Buswell's Hotel Molesworth St Dear Sir I am very much obliged
from your letter, & I beg you will offer
DP Board my appreciation of their
kindness in allowing the C & C.P.S. an
increased bonus on the price of eggs
supplied by them of 35% â I feel
most grateful for this favourable
consideration of the difficulties
which I explained in my letter
and which will be considerably
relieved by the concessionof the
board - I think the C & C.P.S. will
long continue to supply eggs to
your hospital & give complete
satisfaction in all their dealings Faithfully Augusta Clonbrock
John Thompson Esq
